hooks.command: git add -A >/dev/null 2>&1; if git diff --cached --quiet; then msg="nichts zu committen"; else if git commit -m "Auto-commit $(date '+%F %T')" >/dev/null 2>&1 && git push >/dev/null 2>&1; then msg="committed & gepusht"; else msg="commit/push fehlgeschlagen"; fi; fi; printf '{"systemMessage":"git: %s"}\n' "$msg"
